scene_description:
### Foreground to Background Description  

#### ROAD SURFACE & MARKINGS  
- **Foreground**: The road is asphalt with a double yellow solid center line (center foreground). White dashed lines run along the right edge (right foreground), with dark patches (likely moisture or oil) on the asphalt near the right edge. A dirt and gravel shoulder extends along the left side of the road (left foreground). On the right side, a dirt shoulder is present (right foreground), adjacent to a grassy area.  
- **Midground to Background**: The double yellow center line and white dashed right-edge lines continue into the distance (center to right background). The left side of the road has a narrow dirt/gravel strip (left foreground to background), with a grassy area beyond it. The right shoulder is a wider dirt area (right foreground to background), transitioning into grass.  

#### INFRASTRUCTURE  
- **Bollards**: A small, cylindrical gray bollard (metal) is on the grassy area left of the road (left foreground).  
- **Utility Poles**: A tall wooden utility pole stands on the grassy area right of the road (right middle background). It has multiple horizontal wires (several power lines), with visible insulators and a horizontal crossbar. A small white rectangular sign is attached to the pole (text not legible). A second utility pole is visible further in the background (right background).  
- **Fences**: A metal chain-link fence (with vertical posts and wire mesh) runs parallel to the road on the right side (right middle foreground to background). The fence has vertical posts with caps, and wire mesh between them.  
- **Street Lamps**: A tall street lamp with a single lamp head is visible on the right side, further in the background (right background).  

#### VEHICLES & PLATES  
- **Vehicle**: A dark-colored car is centered on the road, driving away from the viewer (center background). No license plate is visible due to distance.  

#### BUILDINGS & ARCHITECTURE  
- **Left Side**: A two-story building (light yellow facade with a brown horizontal stripe) is on the grassy area left of the road (left middle foreground). It has a flat roof, a white garage door, rectangular windows, and a stone lower section. In the background, additional residential buildings (with flat roofs) are visible (left background).  

#### VEGETATION & TERRAIN  
- **Trees**: A palm tree (tall, fronded leaves) is on the grassy area left of the road (left middle foreground). Broad-leafed trees with dense green foliage are scattered on both sides (left and right, foreground to background).  
- **Grass**: Green grass covers the areas beyond the road on both sides (left and right, foreground to background).  
- **Terrain**: The road and surrounding land are flat (no elevation changes), extending to the horizon.  

#### TEXT & SIGNS  
- No visible text is present on signs, buildings, or objects. The small white sign on the utility pole (right middle background) contains no legible text.  

#### ADDITIONAL OBSERVATIONS  
- **Sky**: Clear blue sky with minimal clouds (top of the image).  
- **Driving Side**: The road is a two-lane, two-way road (double yellow center line separating directions), with vehicles driving on the right (indicated by white edge lines and the direction of the car).

details.name: double yellow line
details.reason: The presence of a double yellow center line indicates the driving side and specific road regulations.
details.focused_description: The double yellow line consists of two parallel, solid yellow lines running lengthwise along the center of the road. The lines are straight, continuous, and evenly spaced. They are painted in a bright yellow color on the asphalt surface. The material is paint, and the lines appear well-maintained with no visible breaks or fading.

details.name: wooden utility pole
details.reason: The style of the crossbar and insulators on the pole is a key regional infrastructure identifier.
details.focused_description: The wooden utility pole is a tall, cylindrical pole made of weathered wood, exhibiting a light brown to gray color. It has a rectangular sign attached near its base; the sign displays the text "ELECTRIC" in blue uppercase letters on a white background, with a blue border. The pole shows signs of aging and exposure, with visible wood grain and minor surface wear.

details.name: white dashed line
details.reason: The edge marking helps confirm the side of the road being driven on.
details.focused_description: White dashed line: white in color, consisting of short, evenly spaced segments (dashed pattern) on an asphalt road surface; made of road paint; clear and visible, running parallel to the right edge of the road with no additional markings.

details.name: metal bollard
details.reason: Small cylindrical bollards are used in specific road-side management styles that can be regional.

details.name: chain-link fence
details.reason: The type of fencing used for property boundaries can help narrow down the region.
details.focused_description: A chain-link fence with dark metal posts, featuring a metallic gray mesh of interwoven wires in a diamond pattern. The fence is linear, extending horizontally, supported by evenly spaced vertical posts. The mesh is intact, showing no visible damage. The posts are dark gray, and the mesh has a silver-gray hue. No text is visible on the fence.
